birds.evidence: lonnbergi – (Mathews, 1912) | range_map = Catharacta antarctica map.svg }} The brown skua (Stercorarius antarcticus), also known as the Antarctic skua, Subantarctic skua, southern great skua, southern skua, or hākoakoa (Māori), is a large seabird that breeds in the subantarctic and Antarctic zones and moves farther north when not breeding
